name: AuditBoard
description: AuditBoard — connected risk, audit & compliance platform. Imports AuditBoard policies + evidence/documents into the XORCISM controlled-document register (XCOMPLIANCE.DOCUMENT). Offline: a JSON export. Live: set AUDITBOARD_BASE (https://<tenant>.auditboardapp.com) + AUDITBOARD_API_TOKEN (Bearer). Tool: https://www.auditboard.com.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline JSON export of AuditBoard policies/evidence.

parameters.name: base
parameters.help: AuditBoard tenant base URL (https://<tenant>.auditboardapp.com). Overrides AUDITBOARD_BASE. Live needs AUDITBOARD_API_TOKEN.
